response.reasoning: The role is Director-level IC Principal Engineer requiring 15 years experience with deep AI/cloud expertise, demonstrated AI products, and strategic advisory capability. Candidate has roughly 14-16 years of varied software development experience (starting freelance 2006, professional ~2009), primarily as senior/staff individual contributor. Recent re:cinq role mentions AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work (only ~14 months), but the bulk of career is web/full-stack development, geo-data platforms, and direct mail automation — not AI/ML platform building. No advanced degree, no recognized AI expertise, no demonstrated AI products at scale, no evidence of advising strategic customers or operating at director level. Strong craftsmanship, TDD, and polyglot breadth, plus open-source founder experience (GISCollective), but lacks the AI depth, scale, and strategic-leadership signal the role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Founder of open-source GIS platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
No director-level or principal-level strategic leadership track record
No advanced degree and limited cloud-platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and demonstrated AI products

response.justification: The candidate is a solid senior/staff engineer with strong craftsmanship and recent light exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the résumé does not show the recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products, or director-level strategic influence required for a Principal Engineer AI Strategy role. The career arc is hands-on product engineering rather than platform-level AI innovation or executive technical advisory.
